scripts.generate-qir: tsx -e "const { Queue } = require('bullmq'); const q = new Queue('generate-qir', { connection: { host: 'localhost', port: 6379 } }); const [,, ...args] = process.argv; const yearIdx = args.indexOf('--year'); const qIdx = args.indexOf('--quarter'); const year = yearIdx >= 0 ? parseInt(args[yearIdx+1]) : new Date().getFullYear(); const quarter = qIdx >= 0 ? parseInt(args[qIdx+1]) : Math.floor(new Date().getMonth()/3)+1; q.add('generate', { year, quarter }).then(() => { console.log('Queued QIR generation for Q'+quarter+' '+year); process.exit(0); });"
